---
title: "Resources"
description: "A collection of curated resources, research papers, and workshops in Geospatial Data Science and AI."
toc: true
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="../assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

# 📚 Research Resources

Welcome to the protected resources section. Here you will find detailed notes, workshop summaries, and curated links to advanced topics in Remote Sensing, Machine Learning, and GIS.

::: {.callout-note}
## Curated Content
These resources are curated for deep learning and research purposes. Each section covers a specific workshop or a research area with links to original papers and datasets.
:::

## 🌐 Topics

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="ml-remote-sensing.qmd" class="stretched-link"></a>
### ML for Remote Sensing (ICLR 2023)
Summary and resources from the ICLR 2023 Workshop on Machine Learning for Remote Sensing.
<span class="resource-link-text">Explore Topic <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

::: {.resource-card}
<a href="cloud-gis.qmd" class="stretched-link"></a>
### Cloud GIS & Open Source
Discussion on the shift towards open-source technologies like Python and R in Geospatial science.
<span class="resource-link-text">Explore Topic <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></span>
:::

:::
